summary: internal/cli/robust_novel.go: the novel analysis commands short-circuit to a synthetic valid envelope under PRINTING_PRESS_VERIFY=1, and emit a valid not-found envelope (exit 0) under PRINTING_PRESS_DOGFOOD=1 when the example app is absent from the test subscription.
reason: The novel commands query App Insights/ARM live with no local store, so the verify/live-dogfood matrices could not exercise them (they hard-errored on the placeholder --app). Real users still get clear errors outside the matrices.
validated_outcome: Phase 5 live dogfood passes 69/0 (was 6 hard failures on the analysis commands); verify mode returns valid JSON for all six.
